subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God, Lord of the world, Creator of nations, and Quickener of moldering bones! I beseech Thee by the Most Great Name which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا اله العالم و موجد الامم و محیی الرمم اسئلک بالاسم الاعظم الذی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
